context: Distributed credential brute-force against Cisco Secure Client / AnyConnect SSL VPN portals on TCP/443. The count of distinct malicious sources jumped to 3,645 on 2026-06-23 from double digits per day a week earlier; 5,464 distinct sources generated 743,802 login attempts across the window. Roughly 132 sources (last 30 days) also carry the Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force behavior, confirming multi-vendor credential attackers, but the activity is not attributable to a single operator. Sessions = corpus-wide login attempts this week.

Crafted jumbo-frame TCP fingerprint (MSS 65495) carried by most Cisco and Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force sessions (99.996% of Fortinet sessions this window). NON-discriminating: it also appears on 150,000+ distinct IPs of unrelated traffic, so it is a triage aid, not a precise link or a shared-operator signal. Sessions = Fortinet SSL VPN Bruteforcer sessions carrying this JA4T, 2026-05-24 to 06-23.

Dominant client (HTTP) fingerprint on the Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force, 68.5% of sessions, 2026-05-24 to 06-23. Durable detection aid for the Fortinet login brute-force. Sessions = Fortinet SSL VPN Bruteforcer sessions carrying this JA4H.
Second most common client fingerprint on the Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force, 2026-05-24 to 06-23. Sessions = Fortinet SSL VPN Bruteforcer sessions carrying this JA4H.
Third most common client fingerprint on the Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force, 2026-05-24 to 06-23. Sessions = Fortinet SSL VPN Bruteforcer sessions carrying this JA4H.

Credential brute-force against Fortinet SSL VPN login portals (TCP/10443, 99.87%). A months-long campaign peaked at 237,584 attempts on 2026-06-02, stood down to 276 on 06-04, and has been dormant since. 10,341 sources over the prior 30 days, classified malicious. Shared as telemetry on a surface named in FortiBleed reporting; GreyNoise observes the network-side activity, not the leak. Sessions = attempts over the prior 30 days.

Fortinet multi-product FortiCloud SSO authentication bypass. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV. Referenced alongside FortiBleed. Fortinet confirmed in-the-wild exploitation earlier in 2026; GreyNoise maintains a detection tag and observed no sessions across its sensors this window. Point-in-time 2026-06-23.

Fortinet FortiOS/FortiProxy FortiCloud SSO SAML authentication bypass. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV. GreyNoise observed 7 sessions from 4 DigitalOcean-hosted sources, all classified malicious and also matched to the DigitalOcean business service (opportunistic multi-CVE crawlers, not targeted). Sessions = attempts observed, 2026-05-24 to 06-23.

Fortinet FortiWeb FortiCloud SSO SAML authentication bypass. CVSS 9.8. GreyNoise holds CVE intelligence (no detection tag) and observed no sessions across its sensors this window. Point-in-time 2026-06-23.

Large MSSQL login-scanning population (9,126 distinct sources this week) that some FortiBleed reporting associates with the same activity. ZERO source-IP overlap with the Fortinet SSL VPN brute-force population, so the two cannot be connected in GreyNoise data. Suspicious classification. Sessions = corpus-wide this week.

Hikvision IP camera unauthenticated command injection. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV. Carried-over source 93.123.72.183 (NL/AS206264 Amarutu/Koddos) grew its single-purpose /SDK/webLanguage probing; partner 204.76.203.206 from the 2026-06-15 documented pair returned to the top emitters and a new host 5.61.209.92 joined across the 204.76.203.0/24 block. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2021-36260 attempt tag.

TeleMessage TM SGNL Spring Boot Actuator /heapdump credential disclosure. CVSS 5.3. CISA KEV (added 2025-06-30). Probed by 213.209.159.175; exposes process memory and embedded secrets via unauthenticated GET. Single top patch priority this cycle. Sessions = attempts observed from the one source.

Laravel Framework credential leak via storage/logs/laravel.log. Probed by the German secrets-theft host 213.209.159.175 alongside dense .env, Git, AWS, and Spring Boot Actuator enumeration. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2024-29291 attempt tag.
Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49/2.4.50 path traversal RCE. CVSS 7.5. CISA KEV. Sustained background probing. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2021-41773 attempt tag.
PHPUnit Util/PHP/eval-stdin.php RCE. CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV. High-volume opportunistic probing. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2017-9841 attempt tag.
React Server Components unsafe deserialization RCE. CISA KEV. Long-running, recurring high-volume probing tracked across many prior briefs. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2025-55182 attempt tag.
X Server unauthenticated display connection. Sustained probing tail; legacy exposure check. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-1999-0526 attempt tag.
PHP CGI argument injection RCE. CISA KEV. Persistent. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2012-1823 attempt tag.
PHP CGI argument injection (Windows Best-Fit). CVSS 9.8. CISA KEV. Persistent probing. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2024-4577 attempt tag.
ASUS router broken authentication bypass. Persistent IoT credential-attack vector. Sessions = corpus-wide CVE-2021-32030 attempt tag.

Provider/rDNS pattern on AS206264 (Amarutu Technology Ltd) hosting the carried-over Hikvision CVE-2021-36260 source 93.123.72.183 (NL) and the broadened source set; recurring infrastructure across briefs. Sessions = that host's total this week.

NL block on the Hikvision operator's infrastructure, hosting the returned source 204.76.203.206 (541,004) plus 204.76.203.219 and 204.76.203.36. Block at perimeter with /SDK/webLanguage path detection fallback. Sessions = combined volume of the block's top emitters this week.
Top Cisco SSL VPN brute-force source block this week (6 IPs among the top emitters). Block at perimeter and pair with rate-limiting. Sessions = block volume among top emitters.
Cisco SSL VPN brute-force source block this week (4 IPs among the top emitters). Block at perimeter and pair with rate-limiting. Sessions = block volume among top emitters.
AS197170 TechTies Inc. NL persistent scanner pair (85.11.167.11 + 85.11.167.7). Block at perimeter. Sessions = combined pair volume this week.
